description: Escape to the serene beauty of Hakone, where the soothing sounds of nature and the warmth of hot springs create the perfect backdrop for a romantic getaway. Nestled in the mountains, this enchanting destination offers breathtaking views of Mount Fuji, lush landscapes, and luxurious ryokans with private open-air baths. Immerse yourselves in the tranquility of the region as you explore its stunning natural beauty and indulge in rejuvenating onsen experiences. This 2-day itinerary is designed for couples seeking relaxation and a deeper connection with each other amidst the serene ambiance of Hakone.

activities.activity: Check-in at a Ryokan with Private Open-Air Bath
activities.description: Arrive at your luxurious ryokan, where you can unwind in a room featuring a private open-air bath. Enjoy the serene atmosphere and stunning views of the surrounding nature as you settle in and prepare for a relaxing stay.

activities.activity: Lunch at a Local Kaiseki Restaurant
activities.description: Savor a traditional kaiseki lunch made with seasonal ingredients at a nearby restaurant. This multi-course meal is a delightful introduction to the flavors of Hakone, showcasing the region's culinary artistry.

Explore the Hakone Open-Air Museum, where art and nature beautifully intertwine. Stroll through the outdoor galleries featuring sculptures by renowned artists, and don't miss the Picasso Pavilion for a unique artistic experience.
Take a leisurely walk in Gora Park, a picturesque landscape garden with seasonal flowers and a charming pond. It's the perfect spot to unwind and enjoy the tranquility of nature before dinner.

Indulge in a sumptuous dinner at your ryokan, featuring a selection of local delicacies and fresh ingredients. Enjoy the intimate dining experience while soaking in the peaceful ambiance of the ryokan.

activities.activity: Soak in the Private Open-Air Bath
activities.description: End your day by soaking in your private open-air bath, surrounded by the sounds of nature. This is the perfect way to relax and rejuvenate after a day of exploration in Hakone.
Start your day with a traditional Japanese breakfast at your ryokan, featuring seasonal ingredients and local specialties. It's a delightful way to fuel up for a day of relaxation and exploration.
Take a scenic boat cruise on Lake Ashi, surrounded by stunning views of Mount Fuji. The tranquil waters and fresh mountain air create a perfect atmosphere for a romantic morning.
Enjoy a leisurely lunch at a lakeside restaurant, where you can savor local dishes while taking in the beautiful views of the lake and mountains.

Visit Owakudani, a volcanic valley with active sulfur vents and hot springs. Take a walk along the trails and enjoy the unique landscape, and don't forget to try the famous black eggs boiled in the hot springs!

Return to your ryokan and unwind in the onsen. Enjoy the soothing hot springs, especially the outdoor baths that offer a serene view of the surrounding nature. It's the perfect way to relax and rejuvenate.
Indulge in a kaiseki dinner at your ryokan, a multi-course meal that showcases the best of seasonal ingredients. Each dish is beautifully presented, making for a memorable dining experience.

activities.activity: Evening Stroll in the Ryokan Garden
activities.description: Take a romantic evening stroll in the ryokan's garden. The peaceful ambiance and the sound of nature create a perfect setting for a quiet moment together under the stars.
